content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission


January 12, 1994

John C. Vergelli, Esq.
Livingston & Mattesich
1201 K Street, Suite 1100
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Confirmation
of Telephone Advice
Our File No. I-93-485

Dear Mr. Vergelli:

This is in response to your request for confirmation of
telephone advice provided to you concerning requirements of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ Since your request does not
identify a specific client, we treat it as one for informal advice
pursuant to Regulation 18329(b)(2) and (c)(1).²

Your firm represents an organization whose intended
activities are to conduct a grass roots letter and media campaign
for the purpose of providing information to the public and
organizing their support for eventual action by the United States
Congress and the Clinton Administration. The organization will
neither be lobbying state legislators and officials, nor be
attempting to influence the outcome of any state or local
elections.

This is to confirm that under those facts, this organization
will not be a "Committee" for purposes of Section 82013 and,
therefore, will not be required either to file a statement of
organization with the Secretary of State or to comply with other
provisions of the Act. As I indicated, the provisions of the Act
do not apply to campaign or lobbying efforts which are directed
solely at federal candidates and issues.


1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references
are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission
regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations, Sections
18000-18954. All references to regulations are to title 2,
Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

2 Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the
immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice.
(Government Code Section 83114; 2 Cal. Code of Regs.
Section 18329(c)(3).)

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento, CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

File No. I-93-485
Page 2


     I hope this has been of assistance. If you have further
questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.


                                        Sincerely,

                                        Steven G. Churchwell
                                        General Counsel

                                        [signature]
                                        By: Scott Hallabrin
                                            Assistant General Counsel

SGC:SH:ak
